title: cerasus × kawasakii
intro: Cerasus × kawasakii is a hybrid plant, resulting from the cross between Prunus serrulata (Japanese cherry) and Prunus speciosa (Japanese hill cherry). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily used to treat fever and inflammation due to its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Cerasus × kawasakii include its ability to relieve headaches, reduce body temperature, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Herbal preparations of Cerasus × kawasakii can be found in teas, infusions, and decoctions, often used in traditional East Asian medicine.
